title: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends
message_html: Crypto firms face July 1 EU cutoff as MiCA grace period ends ...
snippet: The ESMA says crypto companies without MiCA authorization must stop serving EU clients from July 1, even if their licence applications remain under review.

title: Russian ruble stablecoin A7A5 grows despite Western sanctions
message_html: Russian ruble stablecoin A7A5 grows despite Western sanctions ...
snippet: Russian ruble-backed stablecoin A7A5 processed over $110 billion in transactions despite Western sanctions, according to CertiK.

title: Funding Circle renews £200M forward flow agreement with Deutsche Bank
message_html: Funding Circle renews £200M forward flow agreement with Deutsche Bank ...
snippet: Funding Circle renews £200M forward flow agreement with Deutsche Bank FX News Group

title: Revolut Wants to Give US Banking Customers Stablecoin Access
message_html: Revolut Wants to Give US Banking Customers Stablecoin Access ...
snippet: Revolut reportedly plans to include stablecoins as part of its U.S. banking offering. That’s according to Revolut U.S. CEO Cetin Duransoy, interviewed Wednesday (June 3) by Reuters. In addition to stablecoins, the plan is to also give customers of the U.K.-based FinTech access to FDIC-backed product

title: Revolut's US bank to offer stablecoin services alongside FDIC-insured products
message_html: Revolut's US bank to offer stablecoin services alongside FDIC-insured products ...
snippet: Revolut U.S. CEO Cetin Duransoy told Reuters the company plans to offer access to stablecoins in the United States.

title: EdgeX offers refunds and launches 200,000 USDC bounty after 71% token flash crash
message_html: EdgeX offers refunds and launches 200,000 USDC bounty after 71% token flash crash ...
snippet: EdgeX says that 174 addresses flooded a PancakeSwap pool with EDGE token sell orders during a period of low liquidity.

title: House of Lords committee urges UK regulators to ease stablecoin rules that could stifle market growth
message_html: House of Lords committee urges UK regulators to ease stablecoin rules that could stifle market growth ...
snippet: A UK House of Lords committee warned that Britain lags the U.S. and the EU on stablecoins, calling on the BoE and FCA to revise rules.

title: MoneyGram Brings 150 Years of Remittance Infrastructure to Stablecoins With MGUSD Launch
